show-temp-in-panel.tooltip: When off, only the fan-state icon appears in the panel.

notify-on-critical.description: Show desktop popups for critical states
notify-on-critical.tooltip: Pops only for thermal_overrun, sensor_error, and daemon-stopped — the things that actually need your attention. Each state has a 10-minute cooldown to prevent spam. Less-severe states (BIOS reclaim, sustained heat) are conveyed by the icon color only.

status-file.tooltip: Override only if you've changed the daemon's STATUS_FILE.
